parameters.query:
SELECT
  client_id,
  workflow_name,
  COUNT(*) as total_executions,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 END) as failed_executions,
  ROUND((COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 END)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)) * 100, 2) as error_rate
FROM workflow_executions
WHERE started_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
GROUP BY client_id, workflow_name
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 END) > 0

SELECT
  c.id as client_id,
  COUNT(t.id) as overdue_count,
  MAX(t.due_date) as latest_overdue
FROM tasks t
JOIN clients c ON t.client_id = c.id
WHERE t.status != 'completed'
  AND t.due_date < NOW()
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM alerts a
    WHERE a.client_id = c.id
      AND a.alert_type = 'sla_overdue'
      AND a.triggered_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
  )
GROUP BY c.id
HAVING COUNT(t.id) > 0

SELECT
  COUNT(*) as dlq_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' THEN 1 END) as new_dlq_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN retry_attempt >= max_retry_attempts THEN 1 END) as permanently_failed_count
FROM dead_letter_queue
